channel.title: BUbuisnessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbuisnessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Finance leaders are divided on how they’d use potential tariff refunds—with just 18% saying they’d fully roll back price increases
item.description: Supreme Court’s IEEPA ruling raises questions on sharing potential refunds with customers or suppliers.

item.title: Exclusive: Cyclops raises $8 million to build stablecoin infrastructure for payments companies
item.description: The startup’s customers include urban helicopter service Blade and Jeff Bezos’s Blue Origin.

item.title: Talarico defeats Crockett in heated primary as Democrats seek first Texas Senate seat in decades
item.description: Jasmine Crockett and James alarico each argued that they would be the stronger general election candidate in a state that backed Trump by almost 14 po...

item.title: Nationwide voter revolt over property taxes collides with reality that every other revenue source has been slashed already
item.description: “Completely slashing them is really unrealistic, since it really is the largest source of on revenues for most local governments in the United States....

item.title: Sam Altman turned down a documentary’s requests to talk. So the director cast a ‘Sam Bot’ as its protagonist
item.description: Adam Bhala Lough said he got the idea for "Sam Bot" from OpenAI's audacious release of a chatbot that sounded like actress Scarlett Johansson.

item.title: Selloff descends into a rout in South Korean stocks
U.S. private-sector hiring picked up in February, ADP data show
Economic calendar: Watch for ADP employment data and ISM service-sector update
Goldman hikes oil-price forecast as it assesses Strait of Hormuz impact
The key comment a Blackstone exec made on the state of private credit
